title: Glow Shield
description: Give your shield the same glow as torches in LambDynamicLights so you don't need a torch in your off-hand!
body:
# **Glow Shield**

Glow Shield is a simple texture pack that makes your shield emit the same amount of light as torches do using LambDynamicLights, so that you don't have to keep a torch in your off-hand anymore!

**- Requires [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)**


<details>
<summary>Tags</summary>
Glow Shield, Glowing Shield, Light Shield, Torch Shield, Shield Glow, Shield Lights, Torch shield, LambDynamicLights, Dynamic Light Shield, LambDynamicLights Addon
</details>
